name: Disable MRU History (Recent Files Tracking)
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: Settings that suppress recent file/folder tracking across Explorer and common dialogs — NoRecentDocsHistory, ClearRecentDocsOnExit, NoRecentDocsNetHood.
forensic_value: These settings prevent recent file lists from being populated — reducing forensic MRU artifact generation. Presence on a system where anti-forensics wasn't previously configured is suspicious. Also confirm whether 'Clear recent documents on exit' was enabled.
